name: Null's Inclination
explicitMods:
Trigger Socketed Minion Spells on Kill with this Weapon
Minion Spells Triggered by this Item have a 0.25 second Cooldown with 5 Uses
Minions deal 2% increased Damage per 5 Dexterity
flavourText: The hunt continues when the prey falls.

explicitMods: Minions have +30% to all Elemental Resistances

name: Soul Ascension
explicitMods: Eat a Soul when you Hit a Rare or Unique Enemy, no more than once every 0.5 seconds
+10 to maximum number of Eaten Souls
flavourText: Fear can be instilled by the smallest entity.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any non-blessing skill. Minions cannot gain the Lifetap buff.
explicitMods: Supported Skills Cost Life instead of Mana

Gain Lifetap after Spending a total of 273 Life on Upfront
Costs and Effects of a Supported Skill
Supported Skills deal 19% more Damage while you have Lifetap
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Curses a single enemy, increasing the damage they take from projectiles, and making projectiles split when hitting them, to hit other targets around them. You can only have one Mark at a time.

Projectiles which Hit Cursed Enemies Split towards 2 additional targets

name: Replica Voidwalker
explicitMods: You have Phasing if you've Killed Recently
Projectiles Chain +1 times while you have Phasing
flavourText: "Test subject was able to walk into the walls of his chamber after breaking a rabbit's neck.
He was not fast enough, however. Suggest we begin excavation to retrieve prototype."

explicitMods: You and nearby allies gain 58% increased Critical Strike Chance
You and nearby allies gain +701 to Accuracy Rating

name: Death Rush
explicitMods: Gain Adrenaline for 3 seconds on Kill
flavourText: To truly appreciate life you must be there when it ends

explicitMods: Projectiles cannot collide with Enemies in Close Range
flavourText: The single well-placed arrow that changes the world
must be preceded by ten thousand practice shots.

name: Nimis
implicitMods: Adds 10 to 15 Fire Damage to Spells and Attacks
explicitMods: Projectiles are fired in random directions
flavourText: Too much of something is bad enough;
too much of nothing is just as tough.

name: Headhunter
explicitMods: 21% increased Damage with Hits against Rare monsters
When you Kill a Rare monster, you gain its Modifiers for 60 seconds
flavourText: "A man's soul rules from a cavern of bone, learns and
judges through flesh-born windows. The heart is meat.
The head is where the Man is."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

name: Dying Sun
explicitMods: 18% increased Area of Effect during Effect
Skills fire 2 additional Projectiles during Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: All things must die.
Whether you burn out or explode is up to you.

explicitMods: 55% increased Critical Strike Chance during Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: Solstice Vigil
explicitMods: Gain Shaper's Presence for 10 seconds when you kill a Rare or Unique Enemy
Temporal Chains has no Reservation if Cast as an Aura
flavourText: Time, like light, can be refracted into all its myriad colours.
The first shade is beautiful, but the last will drive the unwary insane.

name: Atziri's Promise
explicitMods: Gain 8% of Elemental Damage as Extra Chaos Damage during effect
2% of Chaos Damage Leeched as Life during Effect
Gain 5% of Physical Damage as Extra Chaos Damage during effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: "Death needs not your understanding. It needs only your loyalty."
- Atziri, Queen of the Vaal

name: Esh's Mirror
explicitMods: Shocks you inflict spread to other Enemies within 1.5 metres
Adds 1 to 10 Lightning Damage for each Shocked Enemy you've Killed Recently
flavourText: She looked upon her reflection
and trembled, and shook,
until she was not what she saw.

properties.name: Attack, Melee, AoE, Movement, Travel, Physical

socketedItems.secDescrText: Charges at a targeted location or enemy, pushing away enemies in your path and repeatedly dealing off-hand damage in a small area in front of you. You deal damage in a larger area when you reach the target. The further you travel, the more damage you deal, and the greater your chance of stunning enemies.
explicitMods: 9 to 13 Base Off Hand Physical Damage
3 to 5 Added Physical Damage per 15 Armour or Evasion Rating on Shield
75% increased Stun Threshold reduction on enemies at Maximum charge distance
100% more Damage with Hits at Maximum Charge Distance
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Cinderswallow Urn
explicitMods: Recharges 5 Charges when you Consume an Ignited corpse
You can apply an additional Curse during Effect
Enemies Ignited by you during Effect take 8% increased Damage
Recover 3% of Energy Shield when you Kill an Enemy during Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: A controlled burn is sometimes necessary for new life.

name: Inpulsa's Broken Heart
explicitMods: 50% increased Damage if you have Shocked an Enemy Recently

Shocked Enemies you Kill Explode, dealing 5% of
their Life as Lightning Damage which cannot Shock
flavourText: Don't hesitate; bring death to all, conclusively and swiftly,
or they will give you the same treatment.

explicitMods: Supported Skills have +138% to Critical Strike Multiplier

Projectile when Forking

flavourText: Lioneye earned his moniker by killing
three men with a single arrow.

name: Loath Shine
explicitMods: 3% chance to receive additional Abyss items when opening a Reward Chest in a Heist
7% chance to receive additional Armour items when opening a Reward Chest in a Heist
6% chance in Heists for Orbs of Augmentation to drop as Chaos Orbs instead
19% chance in Heists for Jeweller's Orbs to drop as Orbs of Fusing instead

name: The Wise Oak
explicitMods: During Effect, 6% reduced Damage taken of each Element for which your Uncapped Elemental Resistance is lowest
During Effect, Damage Penetrates 8% Resistance of each Element for which your Uncapped Elemental Resistance is highest
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: The summer sun dries the soil and burns the leaves.
The autumn rain extinguishes the flames.
The spring bloom shades the wet earth.
Nature is an eternal tug of war.

name: Piscator's Vigil
explicitMods: Attacks with this Weapon have 115% increased Elemental Damage
Damage with Weapons Penetrates 5% Elemental Resistances
flavourText: "Stone still, amidst the reeds,
breath fogging in the iron cold air.
he sits, he waits, he watches.
A piscatorial vigil, sat by the river,
his cathedral, his patience his unanswered prayer."
- Jojoba Mansell, bard, angler, adventurer
